overview: GyneCare is a production-ready, full-stack MERN Hospital Management System for a gynecology-focused hospital chain in India. It includes a public website, multi-step appointment booking, role-based dashboards, and gynecology-specific modules including a pregnancy tracker and menstrual cycle tracker.
features: Public hospital website with hero, specialities, doctor search, health packages, blogs, and testimonials
6-step appointment booking wizard (city → hospital → department → doctor → date/time → confirm)
Patient Dashboard with pregnancy tracker, menstrual cycle logger, and medical record uploads
Doctor Dashboard with daily schedule, patient list, and performance stats
Admin Dashboard for managing users, doctors, hospitals, content, and packages
JWT authentication with role-based access control (Patient, Doctor, Admin)
Full REST API: 11 route domains, 50+ endpoints
MongoDB with 10 collections and complete data seeder
Detailed README with MongoDB Compass setup guide
